productDisplayName: ASICS Women Ilyeo II Running White Sports Shoes
description: With a durable split-sole construction and gum rubber outsole, the asics Ilyeo II shoe is a great wear for martial art and yoga practice. Replete with comfort, the Ilyeo also makes for a great everyday wear.UpperSynthetic leather upper with perforations for lightweight breathable comfort and durabilitySlip-on style for ease of wearMeshed and padded tongue and collar for all-day comfortMidfoot elastic closure for better supportComforDry sockliner offers anti-microbial properties for a drier, healthier environmentMidsoleCompression moulded EVA midsole for enhanced cushioning and comfortOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with grooves on the forefoot and heel for absolute grip and tractionShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, cloth or brush, cold water and mild detergent to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierAvoid storing shoes in extremely hot conditions or in direct sunlight
